channel.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
channel.description:
Hi, I've a problem with the frontity installation, since it's giving me an error on a Windows machine.
I use this machine for random developing while travelling and I need to keep it on Windows, but I never had problems with react apps before (as example: npx create-react-app myapp works fine).
NPX is giving me this error (screenshot attached) and I've to say. I'm lost, what's up?
C:\esercizieact>npx frontity create my-app && cd my-app Error: EEXIST: file already exists, mkdir 'C:\Users\Matteo' TypeError: Cannot read property 'loaded' of undefined at exit (C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:97:27) at errorHandler (C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:216:3) at C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm in
pm-cli.js:78:20 at cb (C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib
pm.js:225:22) at C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib
pm.js:263:24 at C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib\config\core.js:81:7 at Array.forEach (<anonymous>) at C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib\config\core.js:80:13 at f (C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm
ode_modules\once\once.js:25:25) at afterExtras (C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib\config\core.js:171:20) C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:97 var doExit = npm.config.loaded ? npm.config.get('_exit') : true ^
TypeError: Cannot read property 'loaded' of undefined at exit (C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:97:27) at process.errorHandler (C:
vm\v12.14.0
ode_modules
pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:216:3) at process.emit (events.js:210:5) at process._fatalException (internal/process/execution.js:150:25) Install for [ 'frontity@latest' ] failed with code 7
![Snipaste_2020-01-10_17-57-59|690x288](upload://54teuHt1NNTV8gEmV9JhMrGAdGS.png)

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Awesome

I wonder when npm is planning to fix that. Microsoft now owns both Windows and NPM!

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: mariano.paz.flores
item.description:
Awesome Luis , I am new …trying frontity for the first time to see if I can implement it in my job, and I had the same problem but your post about fixing it…solve it for me…thanks!

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
No problem Mateo, I’m glad that at least it’s solved in your Windows environment

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: matteo.morreale
item.description:
I’d love to help but I don’t have the skills to do that, sorry
By the way in the meantime I’ve switched to Linux so now I’m working on that environment, I cannot even profusely test it anymore…

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Ok, maybe there’s something we can do to fix this in our side. For what I see, create-react-app also should have this problem: https://github.com/facebook/create-react-app/issues/4058 so I don’t understand why it’s working in your case…

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: matteo.morreale
item.description:
Hi luish,
no I haven’t installed it globally, really I don’t know why it’s working but all other npx commands are working, only frontity gave me this error here in Windows 10.

Tried what you said in this other post and it’s working like a charm, thank you

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
It certainly looks like the npx problem with spaces in the user name: Mateo Morreale.

I don’t understand why npx create-react-app works. Did you install it globally? Does it work with create-react-app (no npx)?

You can solve the npx problem with spaces with these instructions:

Error running npx 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
It seems like it is a problem of npx when the user folder contains an space (Saad Faris) It’s crazy that they haven’t solved it yet. You need to move the npm cache to a folder without spaces. First, open cmd as Administrator. Search for cmd Right click Choose “Run as Administraror” Enter your password [10] Then enter these commands in the console: > mklink /J "C:\Users\saad-faris" "C:\Users\Saad Faris" > npm config set cache C:\Users\saad-faris\AppData\Roaming\npm-cache > npm config s…

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: matteo.morreale
item.description:
Hi, sorry if I’ve delayed my reply but I was working on Linux environment and I wasn’t able to move to Windows

Same error on npx frontity info:

Other commands, not frontity one, still works fine.

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
@matteo.morreale is this a problem with npx frontity or only with npx frontity create? What happens if you try npx frontity info?

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Haha, glad you “solved” it then

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: matteo.morreale
item.description:
Not a fix but… I’ve “solved” by installing linux even on this machine.
Still don’t know why it wasn’t working on Windows but… I’ve used as an incentive to move this PC to linux.

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: matteo.morreale
item.description:
Yes, that’s the odd situation… other commands works fine, only frontity fails.

That’s the npx create react app, all working fine

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Does npm itself work correctly? Could you run some other npm command, e.g.: npm info react?

A quick google search tells me that it might be a problem with user permissions for node/npm: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/42678759/npm-error-on-every-command-eexist-file-already-exists-mkdir-c-users-user-ap

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: matteo.morreale
item.description:
Hi!
Sorry, I’ve tried many times and in this one I’ve lost part of the command but it does not work with create.
I’ve tried by updating npm and clearing the cache but still nothing works,!
Node is on the v12.14.1 now, it was on the v12.14.0 before but still it’s not working.

On Linux I’d no problem at all but this is a Windows pc.

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Hi @matteo.morreale !

It seems very much like an issue with node rather than a problem with frontity itself.

In the second screenshot you seem to have run npx frontity frontity-app, but the frontity commad requires an argument like create, create-package, etc. In this case, frontity should have just printed out the help like:

Unknown command: frontity-app

Usage: frontity <command> [options]

Frontity CLI

Options:
  -V, --version                    output the version number
  -h, --help                       output usage information

Commands:
  create [options] [name]          Creates a new Frontity project.
  create-package [options] [name]  Creates a new Frontity package in a project.
  dev [options]                    Starts a server in development mode.
  build [options]                  Builds the project for production.
  serve [options]                  Starts a server in production mode.
  subscribe <email>                Subscribe to Frontity newsletter.
  info                             Get environment information for debugging and issue reporting.

Could you try to following:

  1. clean the npm cache
    try again
  2. reinstall npm
    try again
  3. check your node installation and reinstall node.

Let us know if you’ve managed to solve the problem, cheers

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: christian.nascimento
item.description:
Hi!

Have you tried to update your node version?

Regards

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app

item.title: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
item.dc:creator: matteo.morreale
item.description:
Hi,
I’ve a problem with the frontity installation, since it’s giving me an error on a Windows machine.

I use this machine for random developing while travelling and I need to keep it on Windows, but I never had problems with react apps before (as example: npx create-react-app myapp works fine).

NPX is giving me this error (screenshot attached) and I’ve to say.
I’m lost, what’s up?

C:\esercizi
eact>npx frontity create my-app && cd my-app

Error: EEXIST: file already exists, mkdir ‘C:\Users\Matteo’
TypeError: Cannot read property ‘loaded’ of undefined
at exit (C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:97:27)
at errorHandler (C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:216:3)
at C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm in pm-cli.js:78:20
at cb (C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib pm.js:225:22)
at C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib pm.js:263:24
at C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib\config\core.js:81:7
at Array.forEach ()
at C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib\config\core.js:80:13
at f (C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm ode_modules\once\once.js:25:25)
at afterExtras (C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib\config\core.js:171:20)
C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:97
var doExit = npm.config.loaded ? npm.config.get(’_exit’) : true
^

TypeError: Cannot read property ‘loaded’ of undefined
at exit (C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:97:27)
at process.errorHandler (C: vm\v12.14.0 ode_modules pm\lib\utils\error-handler.js:216:3)
at process.emit (events.js:210:5)
at process._fatalException (internal/process/execution.js:150:25)
Install for [ ‘frontity@latest’ ] failed with code 7

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot install frontity with npx frontity create my-app
